creator: mark@kyne.com.au
text:
The icculus.org domain has disappeared. I haven't found a replacement site.
Could the commiter who handles this please take "mp3check"
(uudecode/gunzip first), put it in their freefall webspace and update the
MASTER_SITES. Thanks.

How-To-Repeat: 
Try to visit the web page, "make fetch", ...
